response_text:
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK airplane_id
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : PK
ATTR registration : varchar
ATTR model : varchar
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR departure_date : date
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_date : date
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR origin_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar

ENTITY Seat
PK flight_id, seat_number
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar : PK
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_id, status_date_time
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_date_time : datetime : PK
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR belt_number : varchar

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_id
REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=city_id
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_id
REL Flight -> CrewAssignment : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL Flight -> Seat : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_id
REL Seat -> Passenger : 1 -> 0..1 : FK=passenger_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL Flight -> BaggageBelt : 1 -> 0..1 : FK=flight_id
